# Earning Points

Acme Rewards members earn one point for every dollar spent on eligible merchandise, excluding taxes, delivery, and gift-card purchases. Points post to the account two business days after an order ships rather than at checkout, so returned products never leave orphaned points behind. Members earn double points during the first seven days after a birthday recorded in their profile.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#earning-points]
